name: Size Exclusion Chromatography Running Buffer
nameCn: 分子排阻色谱运行缓冲液

components.name: HEPES (1 M, pH 7.5)
components.note: 20 mM final; or 50 mM sodium phosphate pH 7.4

components.name: DTT (1 M stock)
components.note: 0.1 mM; omit if protein lacks Cys or downstream MS

notes.en: Filter through 0.22 µm and degas extensively (30 min vacuum or online degasser). Equilibrate column with ≥2 CV before injection. For phospho-proteins or specific assays, adjust NaCl to 100–300 mM. Avoid EDTA if downstream metal-sensitive assays.
notes.zh: 0.22 µm 过滤后充分脱气（真空 30 min 或在线脱气）。进样前用 ≥2 CV 平衡柱子。磷酸化蛋白可调整 NaCl 至 100–300 mM。下游金属敏感实验避免加 EDTA。

ref: GE Healthcare SEC Application Note 18-1114-02; Wyatt et al. (2017) Nat Protoc 12:1683

storage.notes: Filter 0.22 µm and degas; make fresh monthly

usage.en: Running buffer for size exclusion chromatography (SEC) on FPLC/AKTA systems.
usage.zh: FPLC/AKTA 系统分子排阻色谱的运行缓冲液。
